name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Five Stone Ring
description:
A timeless five-stone diamond ring crafted in rich 18ct yellow gold with an elegant white gold setting. Set with five beautifully matched old-cut diamonds, with a total estimated diamond weight of approximately 0.70ct, each stone displays the soft, romantic sparkle that only antique-cut diamonds possess. The classic graduated design sits beautifully on the hand, making it equally perfect as an engagement ring, anniversary ring or cherished everyday heirloom. A truly enduring piece of jewellery, designed to be worn and loved for generations. 

Unmarked but tests as 18ct. Diamonds are all eye clean, bright and well-matched. 1.8g.

Total diamond weight is a mounted estimate.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Diamond Ring
description: Set with oval-cut sapphires and brilliant cut diamonds. Stones are set into 18ct white gold. Fully hallmarked. 3g.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Five Stone Ring
description:
Set with five graduated brilliant-cut diamonds totalling approximately 0.5ct. Diamonds are all eye clean, bright and well-matched. Fully hallmarked for London, 1978. 3g.

Total diamond weight is a mounted estimate.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Five Stone Ring
description:
Set with five graduated brilliant-cut diamonds totalling approximately 0.25ct. Diamonds are all eye clean, bright and well-matched. Stamped for 18ct and platinum. Diamonds are set into platinum. 1.6g.

Total diamond weight is a mounted estimate.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Diamond Trefoil Ring
description:
Set with oval-cut sapphire and brilliant-cut diamonds. Fully hallmarked for London, 1988. 

Please note that one of the prongs on the sapphire shows signs of wear but the goldsmith has verified that the stone is secure. 2.3g.

name: 9ct White Gold Diamond Half-eternity Ring
description: Art deco-style band bezel- and claw-set with brilliant-cut diamonds. Fineness stamp for 9ct gold. 3.3g.

name: 18ct White Gold Diamond Five Stone Ring
description:
Set with graduated round brilliant-cut diamonds totalling approximately 0.80 carats. Diamonds are all eye clean, bright and well-matched. Fully hallmarked for Birmingham, 1984. 
2.7g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Diamond Ring
description:
Set with a central marquise-cut sapphire flanked on each side by five princess cut sapphires within a border of round brilliant cut diamonds. Stamped 9ct for nine carat gold. Late 20th century. 
3.7g.

name: 18ct White Gold Diamond Five Stone Ring
description:
Set with five brilliant-cut diamonds totalling approximately 1ct. Diamonds are all eye clean, bright and well-matched. Fully hallmarked. 
3.16g.

Total diamond weight is a mounted estimate.

name: 9ct Bezel-set Sapphire and Diamond Band
description: 9ct yellow gold ring set with an oval-cut sapphire, accented by two sparkling diamonds in a classic two-tone setting (sapphire set into 9ct white gold). Fully hallmarked. 2.8g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Pear-cut Lab Diamond Solitaire
description:
1.04ct pear-cut lab-grown diamond set in polished 9ct yellow gold, featuring a contemporary flowing bypass design. D colour and VS1 clarity. Diamond is IGI-certified. Certificate provided with ring. 
2.9g

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Half-eternity Ring
description:
A beautifully substantial diamond half-eternity ring crafted in rich yellow gold. The softly rounded, chunky profile gives the piece a luxurious weight and timeless presence, while the diamonds catch the light from every angle. A classic design that works just as beautifully as a wedding band, eternity ring or statement stacking piece, destined to become an everyday heirloom.

Set with round brilliant-cut diamonds totalling approximately 1.2ct (assessed as D/E colour and VVS1/2 clarity). Fineness stamp of 750 indicating 18ct gold. 5.2g.

Total diamond weight is a mounted estimate.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Gypsy Ring
description: 18ct yellow gold band star-set with a .05ct diamond. Diamond is eye clean and bright. Fully hallmarked for Birmingham (date symbol is worn). 5.5g

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Belcher-style Solitaire
description: 18ct yellow gold set with an approximately 0.15ct diamond. Diamond is extremely bright with excellent clarity. There is an ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ18ctÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ fineness stamp but no additional hallmarks. Likely an antique piece. 3.5g.

name: 18ct White Gold Princess-cut Diamond Trilogy
description: 18ct white gold band set with three princess-cut diamonds in a bezel-style setting. Diamonds are eye clean, extremely white and bright. Fully hallmarked.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Bezel-set Diamond Trilogy
description:
18ct yellow gold band bezel-set with three diamonds. Diamonds are set into 18ct white gold. Diamonds have exceptional colour and clarity. 2.7g.

The channel-set diamond band shown alongside the ring in some photographs is for styling purposes only and is not included with the purchase.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Trilogy
description:
Antique 18ct yellow gold bypass ring set with three old cut diamonds totalling approximately 0.5 carats. Diamonds are eye clean and bright with a warmth characteristic of old cuts. Unmarked but tests as 18ct gold. 1.7g.

The channel-set diamond band shown alongside the ring in some photographs is for styling purposes only and is not included with the purchase.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Opal Gypsy Ring
description:
9ct yellow gold band star-set with sapphires and fiery opals. Fully hallmarked for Birmingham, 1977. 2.6g.

This ring has been lovingly restored by my goldsmith. The original opals were damaged and so have been replaced with two brand new natural opals.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Diamond Trilogy
description: 9ct yellow gold individually claw-set with three diamonds. Fully hallmarked. 1.8g.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Crossover Band
description: Delicate 18ct yellow gold bypass ring set with ten bright, white diamonds. Unmarked but tests as 18ct. 1.5g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Diamond Etoile Band
description:
A beautifully understated étoile ring, crafted in solid 9ct yellow gold and flush set with approximately 0.25ct of natural round brilliant-cut diamonds. The gently tapered band is polished to a high shine, allowing the diamonds to appear as though they are scattered across the gold like stars in the night sky.

Timeless and effortlessly wearable, this piece is perfect worn alone as an elegant everyday ring or stacked with other bands for a more contemporary look. Its sleek, low-profile setting makes it as practical as it is beautiful, a modern heirloom you’ll reach for every day. Fully hallmarked and weighing 3.2g.

Please note that this ring is not suitable for resizing.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Hand-engraved Cigar Band
description: 9ct yellow gold cigar band hand-engraved with foliate detailing. Fully hallmarked. 3.5g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Double-row Diamond Band
description: 9ct yellow gold band channel-set with two rows of bright, sparkly diamonds. International convention hallmarks for 9ct gold. Also stamped “9K”. 2.8g.

name: 9ct White Gold Diamond Milgrain Half-eternity
description: 9ct white gold diamond half-eternity. Each diamond is individually set with  milgrain detail to the border. Fully hallmarked with the international hallmark convention. 1.7g.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Flush-set Diamond Band
description:
Crafted in rich 18ct yellow gold, this elegant étoile band is flush-set with three bright white diamonds, creating a beautifully understated design that has remained timeless for generations. The flush setting offers both durability and effortless everyday wear. Fully hallmarked under the International Convention hallmarking system, the band measures 3mm in width and weighs 2.8g.

Named after the French word for ‘star’, étoile rings became popular for their refined simplicity and symbolic design, with each diamond appearing like a star scattered across the night sky. Whether worn as a wedding band, stacked with other favourites or cherished on its own, this is a beautifully understated piece that will never go out of style.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Flush-set Diamond Band
description:
Crafted in solid 18ct yellow gold, this elegant vintage band is flush-set with five bright white diamonds, creating a clean, timeless design that is as practical as it is beautiful. The smooth setting protects each stone while allowing the diamonds to catch the light with every movement. Fully hallmarked under the International Convention hallmarking system, the band measures 3mm in width and weighs 2.7g.

Effortlessly versatile, this is the kind of ring you’ll never want to take off. Whether worn as a wedding band, stacked with other favourites or simply on its own, its understated elegance ensures it will remain a treasured part of any jewellery collection for years to come.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Bespoke Diamond Signet
description:
A one-of-a-kind vintage signet ring, crafted in solid 9ct yellow gold and set with an antique fancy yellow old mine cut diamond of approximately 0.20–0.30ct. The diamond has been hand-set into a traditional hand-engraved star setting, allowing its warm golden hue and distinctive antique sparkle to take centre stage. Fully hallmarked and weighing an impressive 8.7g.

Lovingly restored and thoughtfully reimagined by a skilled goldsmith, this ring brings together two pieces of history. The antique old mine cut diamond was carefully sourced specifically for this project before being hand-set into the vintage signet, creating a truly unique piece that cannot be replicated. Designed to be worn, cherished and passed from one generation to the next, it is a modern heirloom with a story all of its own.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Antique Sapphire and Diamond Gypsy Ring
description:
18ct yellow gold band star-set with two old cut royal blue sapphires and one diamond. There is scrollwork detailing to the shoulders of the band. Fully hallmarked for Birmingham, 1915. 2.9g.

Condition note: there is minor wear evident on one of the sapphires, consistent with a ring of this age. Reflected in the price.

Crafted in 1915, this authentic antique ring is over 110 years old. The hand-cut sapphires and diamond are nestled within traditional star settings, a technique favoured in the late Victorian and Edwardian periods that allowed the stones to catch the light while remaining secure for everyday wear. A timeless piece carrying over a century of history and craftsmanship.

name: 14ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Diamond Bombé Ring
description:
Crafted in 14ct yellow gold, this elegant bombe ring is adorned with alternating rows of calibre-cut sapphires and brilliant-cut diamonds, creating a beautifully fluid, sculptural design. Stamped 14k. 4.5g.

Popular from the 1940s to the 1960s, bombe rings are celebrated for their bold domed silhouettes and sculptural elegance. A timeless vintage design that remains as striking today as when it was first created.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Diamond Band
description:
An 18ct yellow gold sapphire and diamond half hoop ring, set with alternating rich blue sapphires and sparkling old-cut diamonds. The stones are flush set within a softly rounded gold band, creating an elegant design that is both understated and endlessly wearable. Stamped ‘750’ for 18ct gold. 3.9g.

Note: there is some engraving to the inside of the band, not fully legible as ring may have been resized at some point.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Emerald and Diamond Band
description:
An 18ct yellow gold band centred with a vibrant oval cabochon emerald, delicately framed by two flush-set diamonds. The smooth, tapered band and low-profile setting create an elegant, timeless silhouette that’s perfect for everyday wear. Stamped 750 for 18ct gold. 2.3g. 

Note: Emeralds are softer and more delicate than diamonds, so we recommend avoiding knocks and harsh chemicals. Clean gently with warm soapy water to keep your emerald looking its best.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Diamond Band
description: A delicate and timeless vintage band crafted in 9ct yellow gold, set with alternating round-cut sapphires and brilliant-cut diamonds in a classic claw setting. The slim profile and gently scalloped gallery allow maximum light to pass through each stone, creating beautiful sparkle. Elegant worn alone, it also layers effortlessly with engagement rings or other stacking bands, making it a wonderfully versatile everyday piece. Fully hallmarked. 1.9g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Diamond Signet Ring
description:
A beautifully understated vintage 9ct yellow gold signet ring, set with a sparkling natural diamond in a delicate star setting. The polished shield-shaped face gives this piece a timeless appeal balancing the bold character of a traditional signet with the subtle brilliance of a single diamond. Perfect worn alone as an everyday signature piece or stacked with other favourites.

Fully hallmarked, 1.3g. Resizable.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Diamond Heart Signet
description:
A beautifully crafted 9ct yellow gold signet ring featuring an illusion pavé heart, accented by a sparkling diamond at its centre. The textured setting catches the light beautifully, creating the appearance of a heart filled with diamonds while retaining the timeless simplicity of a classic signet. A sweet and distinctive piece that’s perfect worn alone or stacked with your favourites. 

Stamped ‘375’ for 9ct gold. 1.2g. Resizable.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Antique Gold Diamond Band
description:
A truly one-of-a-kind piece, this beautiful 18ct gold band began its life as a plain wedding ring over 125 years ago before being thoughtfully reimagined with five sparkling lab diamonds in delicate star settings. The result is a ring that honours its history while giving it a new chapter to tell.

Inside, the original inscription remains beautifully preserved:

“Fernand et Juliette unis 23 October 1900.”

A touching reminder of the couple who first exchanged this ring, it transforms the piece from simply antique jewellery into a tangible piece of someone’s love story. More than a century later, it is ready to become part of another.

The star setting is a classic antique technique, with each diamond appearing to shine like a tiny star across the polished gold band. Traditionally symbolising guidance, hope and everlasting love, it feels especially fitting for a ring that has already witnessed a lifetime.

Unmarked but tests as 18ct gold. 3.5g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Diamond Band
description:
Delicate, elegant and beautifully detailed, this vintage 9ct gold band is set with sparkling natural diamonds, each nestled within finely engraved star settings. The subtle milgrain edging and intricate hand-engraved detailing give the ring a wonderfully antique-inspired feel, despite its understated design.

Perfect worn alone as a minimalist diamond band or stacked with your favourite rings, this is an effortlessly versatile piece that adds just a touch of sparkle. The traditional star setting has long symbolised guidance, hope and enduring love, making it as meaningful as it is timeless.

Fully hallmarked, London 1989. 1.3g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Diamond Knot Ring
description:
Delicate, timeless and full of meaning, this beautiful 9ct gold knot ring is a piece you’ll reach for every day. The elegant crossover knot is accented with a row of sparkling natural diamonds, creating just the right amount of understated brilliance.

The knot has long symbolised an unbreakable bond, representing love, friendship, loyalty and connection, making this a wonderfully sentimental piece to gift or treasure for yourself. Its dainty profile makes it perfect worn alone for a minimalist look or stacked effortlessly with your favourite rings.

Stamped ‘375’ for 9ct gold and ‘DIA’ for diamonds. 1.4g.

name: 18ct Gold Diamond Band
description:
A timeless design with a refined feel, this beautiful 18ct gold band features a warm yellow gold shank with a contrasting white gold channel setting, showcasing a striking combination of natural round brilliant and baguette-cut diamonds. The alternating diamond cuts create a beautiful play of light, while the white gold setting enhances their brilliance and gives the ring an elegant two-tone finish.

Perfect as a wedding band, anniversary ring or an everyday diamond band. Equally beautiful worn alone or stacked alongside an engagement ring, this is a versatile piece you’ll reach for time and time again.

Fully hallmarked with the International Convention hallmark and stamped ‘18K’. 3.9g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Half-bezel Amethyst Ring
description:
Elegant in its simplicity, this 9ct gold ring showcases a beautifully cut oval natural amethyst in a sleek half-bezel setting. The warm yellow gold curves gently around either side of the gemstone, creating a clean, contemporary silhouette while allowing the vibrant violet amethyst to take centre stage.

Amethyst has long been associated with peace, clarity and inner strength, making this a thoughtful gift or a meaningful addition to any jewellery collection. The half-bezel setting offers a refined, streamlined look while providing excellent protection for the stone, making it a wonderful choice for everyday wear.

Stamped ‘375’ and ‘9K’. 4.6g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Amethyst and Diamond Band
description:
Elegant and full of rich colour, this vintage 9ct gold band features a row of vibrant natural oval-cut amethysts framed by sparkling natural diamonds. The deep violet hues of the amethysts contrast beautifully against the warm yellow gold, creating a timeless design that is both eye-catching and easy to wear.

Amethyst has long been associated with peace, clarity and protection, while diamonds symbolise strength and enduring love. Whether worn as a statement on its own or stacked with other favourites, this is a versatile piece with classic vintage charm.

Stamped ‘375’. 2.3g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Diamond Knot Ring
description:
A beautiful take on a timeless design, this vintage 9ct gold knot ring is set with a combination of sparkling round brilliant and elegant baguette-cut natural diamonds. The intertwining knot creates a graceful focal point, while the mix of diamond cuts adds depth, texture and light from every angle.

A knot is a traditional symbol of enduring love, friendship and unbreakable bonds, making this a meaningful piece to mark a special occasion or simply to treasure as part of your everyday jewellery collection. Striking enough to wear alone yet refined enough to pair with other favourites, it is a wonderfully versatile design.

Stamped ‘375’ and ‘10pts’ for 9ct gold and 0.1ct diamonds. 2.7g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Claw-set Diamond Band
description:
Simple, timeless and endlessly versatile, this beautiful vintage 9ct gold band is set with a row of natural diamonds in a classic claw setting, allowing each stone to catch the light beautifully. Its elegant profile makes it perfect worn alone as a delicate statement or stacked effortlessly with an engagement ring or other favourite bands.

Whether chosen as a wedding band, anniversary ring or simply an everyday piece, this is a classic design that will never go out of style.

Dublin hallmarks, partially rubbed. 1.7g.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Diamond Snake Ring
description:
Elegant with a touch of symbolism, this vintage 18ct gold snake ring features a rich blue sapphire set between two delicate natural diamond accents. Its sleek crossover design creates the graceful illusion of a serpent wrapping around the finger, making it a timeless and distinctive piece.

For centuries, snake jewellery has symbolised eternal love, wisdom and renewal, with its unbroken form representing everlasting devotion and new beginnings. Combined with the deep blue sapphire, long associated with loyalty and sincerity, this ring carries a sense of meaning while remaining effortlessly wearable.

Fully hallmarked and stamped ‘750’. 3g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Topaz and Amethyst Ring
description:
A pretty and easy-to-wear 9ct gold band set with a graduating row of brilliant-cut topaz and oval-cut amethyst gemstones. The soft blue and lilac tones sit beautifully against the warm yellow gold, while the smooth bezel-style settings give the ring a neat, contemporary finish.

Delicate enough for everyday wear, it looks lovely worn alone or added to a colourful ring stack.

Fully hallmarked with the International Convention hallmark. 2.4g.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Natural Pink Spinel and Diamond Ring
description:
Rich in colour and sentiment, this beautiful vintage 18ct gold ring centres around a vibrant natural pink spinel, nestled between two elegant heart motifs set with diamonds. Warm, romantic and wonderfully distinctive, it is a piece that feels both timeless and deeply personal.

Long treasured by royalty and collectors, natural spinel has often been mistaken for ruby throughout history due to its exceptional colour and brilliance. Today it is celebrated in its own right as a rare and captivating gemstone, symbolising vitality, hope and renewed energy. Paired with diamonds, the enduring emblem of everlasting love, this ring tells a story of affection and resilience.

Dublin hallmarks partially rubbed, stamped ‘750’. 4.4g.
